customManagers.description: Devcontainer Dockerfile ARG pins — suffix-matched so the template's Dockerfile.jinja (inside a jinja-named directory) is managed too
Workflow tool pins (both root and template workflows), `version:` style

packageRules.description: Wait 3 days before proposing any update
Batch all GitHub Actions updates into one PR
Batch regex-managed workflow updates into one PR

Eject anthropics/claude-code-action from the batched GitHub Actions group and skip the 3-day release-age wait. It ships near-daily first-party releases, so grouping + minimumReleaseAge kept the whole Actions batch perpetually pending on the renovate/stability-days gate — each rebase pulled in a fresh release and reset the 3-day clock. It's a trusted first-party action and all updates are reviewed manually (automerge is off globally). Must come after the GitHub Actions group rules so this override wins.
Batch all Docker image updates into one PR
Batch all devcontainer updates (base image + annotated tools) into one PR — must come after the Docker images rule so the base image lands here instead
